title: phyllanthus distichus var. ellipticus
intro: Phyllanthus distichus var. ellipticus, also known as the elliptical leaf green chaya, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Phyllanthus distichus var. ellipticus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or it can be used as a tincture or capsule in herbal preparations.
